name: DocuSign
description: Connects to DocuSign eSignature REST API v2.1 to sync envelopes, retrieve documents, and manage recipients inside the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Integration Key (Client ID)
install_fields.help: The DocuSign Integration Key (Client ID) from your app in the DocuSign Developer Center or Admin Console.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: The OAuth Client Secret associated with your Integration Key.

install_fields.label: Account ID
install_fields.help: Your DocuSign Account ID. If left blank, it will be retrieved automatically from /oauth/userinfo after authorization.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: The OAuth2 redirect URI registered in your DocuSign app. Defaults to the Shielva callback URL.

install_fields.label: Use Sandbox
install_fields.help: Use the DocuSign sandbox (demo) environment. Set to false for production. Defaults to true.

methods.name: Install / Validate Credentials
methods.description: Validate that integration_key and client_secret are present. Returns PENDING_OAUTH if OAuth has not been completed yet.

methods.name: Get Authorization URL
methods.description: Return the DocuSign OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant URL. The user must open this URL to grant consent.

methods.name: Handle OAuth Callback
methods.description: Exchange the authorization code for tokens and fetch account_id + base_uri from /oauth/userinfo.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: GET /accounts/{account_id} and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with account name.

methods.name: Sync Envelopes
methods.description: Fetch completed envelopes from the past 30 days and ingest them into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Envelopes
methods.description: Paginated list of envelopes with optional from_date and status filter.

methods.name: Get Envelope
methods.description: Retrieve a single envelope by ID.

methods.name: List Envelope Documents
methods.description: List all documents attached to an envelope.

methods.name: List Envelope Recipients
methods.description: List all recipients (signers, carbon copies, etc.) for an envelope.
